sentences.target: Ich rufe dich an, wenn du Zeit hast.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʁuːfə dɪç an, vɛn du tsaɪ̯t hast./

translations.de: Ich rufe dich an, wenn du Zeit hast.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʁuːfə dɪç an, vɛn du tsaɪ̯t hast./
translations.en: I’ll call you when you have time.
translations.fr: Je t’appellerai quand tu auras le temps.
translations.zh-Hans: 我会在你有时间的时候给你打电话。
translations.yue: 等你有時間我再打畀你。
translations.ru: Я позвоню тебе, когда у тебя будет время.
translations.pt: Eu te ligo quando você tiver tempo.
translations.he: אני אתקשר אליך כשיהיה לך זמן.
translations.vi: Khi bạn rảnh, tôi sẽ gọi cho bạn.
translations.ar: سأتصل بك عندما يكون لديك وقت.
translations.nl: Ik bel je als je tijd hebt.
translations.uk: Я подзвоню тобі, коли в тебе буде час.
translations.hi: जब तुम्हें समय होगा, मैं तुम्हें फोन करूँगा.
translations.pl: Zadzwonię do ciebie, kiedy będziesz mieć czas.
translations.el: Θα σε πάρω τηλέφωνο όταν έχεις χρόνο.
translations.nb: Jeg ringer deg når du har tid.
translations.id: Aku akan menelepon kamu saat kamu punya waktu.
translations.sv: Jag ringer dig när du har tid.
translations.cs: Zavolám ti, až budeš mít čas.
translations.da: Jeg ringer til dig, når du har tid.
translations.fi: Soitan sinulle, kun sinulla on aikaa.
translations.ja: 時間があるときにあなたに電話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the main clause.
Finite lexical verb, 1st person singular, present indicative; part of separable verb with particle 'an' (forms 'anrufen').
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, accusative; direct object.
Separable verbal particle combining with 'rufe' to form 'anrufen'; placed clause-final in the main clause.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a conditional/temporal clause; triggers verb-final order in the subordinate clause.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, nominative; subject of the subordinate clause.
Common noun, feminine, singular, accusative; object with 'haben' ('have time').
Finite lexical verb, 2nd person singular, present indicative; predicate of the subordinate clause, in clause-final position.

sentences.target: Es klingelt, wenn der Postbote kommt.

translations.de: Es klingelt, wenn der Postbote kommt.
translations.en: It rings when the mail carrier comes.
translations.es: El timbre suena cuando llega el cartero.
translations.fr: La sonnette sonne quand le facteur arrive.
translations.it: Il campanello suona quando arriva il postino.
translations.pt: A campainha toca quando o carteiro chega.
translations.vi: Chuông reo khi người đưa thư đến.
translations.ar: الجرس يرن عندما يأتي ساعي البريد.
translations.nl: De bel gaat als de postbode komt.
translations.hu: A csengő megszólal, amikor megérkezik a postás.
translations.hi: जब डाकिया आता है, तो घंटी बजती है.
translations.el: Το κουδούνι χτυπάει όταν έρχεται ο ταχυδρόμος.
translations.id: Bel berbunyi saat tukang pos datang.
translations.ja: 郵便配達員が来るとチャイムが鳴ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, neuter; impersonal/dummy subject with intransitive 'klingeln'.
Finite intransitive verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; main predicate of the main clause.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal/conditional clause; enforces verb-final order in the subordinate clause.
Definite article, masculine, nominative singular; determiner of 'Postbote'.
Common noun, masculine, nominative singular; subject of the subordinate clause.
Finite lexical verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; predicate of the subordinate clause (verb-final position).

sentences.target: Wir gehen rein, wenn es zu kalt ist.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈɡeːən ʁaɪ̯n, vɛn ɛs tsuː kalt ɪst./

translations.de: Wir gehen rein, wenn es zu kalt ist.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈɡeːən ʁaɪ̯n, vɛn ɛs tsuː kalt ɪst./
translations.en: We go inside when it’s too cold.
translations.fr: On rentre quand il fait trop froid.
translations.zh-Hans: 太冷的时候我们就进去。
translations.ru: Мы заходим внутрь, когда слишком холодно.
translations.pt: A gente entra quando está muito frio.
translations.vi: Trời quá lạnh thì chúng tôi vào trong.
translations.ar: ندخل إلى الداخل عندما يكون الجو شديد البرودة.
translations.nl: We gaan naar binnen als het te koud is.
translations.uk: Ми заходимо всередину, коли надто холодно.
translations.hi: जब बहुत ठंड होती है, हम अंदर चले जाते हैं.
translations.pl: Wchodzimy do środka, gdy jest za zimno.
translations.el: Μπαίνουμε μέσα όταν κάνει πολύ κρύο.
translations.nb: Vi går inn når det er for kaldt.
translations.id: Kalau terlalu dingin, kita masuk ke dalam.
translations.sv: Vi går in när det är för kallt.
translations.cs: Jdeme dovnitř, když je moc zima.
translations.da: Vi går ind, når det er for koldt.
translations.fi: Menemme sisään, kun on liian kylmä.
translations.ja: 寒すぎるときは中に入ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the main clause.
Finite lexical verb, 1st person plural, present indicative; combines with particle 'rein' to form separable verb 'reingehen'.
Separable verbal particle forming 'reingehen' with 'gehen'; appears at clause end in the main clause.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a conditional clause; triggers verb-final order.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, neuter; impersonal subject (weather/temperature 'it').
Degree adverb intensifier meaning 'too' (excess degree) modifying the adjective 'kalt'.
Predicate adjective (positive degree) in a copular construction with 'ist'.
Copula auxiliary, 3rd person singular, present indicative; links subject 'es' with predicate adjective 'kalt' in the subordinate clause.

sentences.target: Tom lacht, wenn er den Film sieht.
sentences.reading: /tɔm laxt, vɛn eːɐ̯ deːn fɪlm ziːt./

translations.de: Tom lacht, wenn er den Film sieht.
translations.ipa: /tɔm laxt, vɛn eːɐ̯ deːn fɪlm ziːt./
translations.en: Tom laughs when he watches the movie.
translations.es: Tom se ríe cuando ve la película.
translations.fr: Tom rit quand il regarde le film.
translations.it: Tom ride quando guarda il film.
translations.zh-Hans: 汤姆看这部电影时会笑。
translations.pt: Tom ri quando assiste ao filme.
translations.vi: Tom cười khi xem bộ phim.
translations.nl: Tom lacht als hij de film kijkt.
translations.hu: Tom nevet, amikor nézi a filmet.
translations.hi: टॉम फिल्म देखते समय हँसता है.
translations.pl: Tom śmieje się, gdy ogląda film.
translations.el: Ο Τομ γελάει όταν βλέπει την ταινία.
translations.nb: Tom ler når han ser filmen.
translations.id: Tom tertawa saat menonton film itu.
translations.sv: Tom skrattar när han tittar på filmen.
translations.ro: Tom râde când se uită la film.
translations.cs: Tom se směje, když sleduje ten film.
translations.da: Tom griner, når han ser filmen.
translations.fi: Tom nauraa, kun hän katsoo elokuvaa.
translations.ja: トムはその映画を見ると笑います。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun, nominative singular; subject of the main clause.
Finite intransitive verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; main predicate of the main clause.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a conditional/temporal subordinate clause; enforces verb-final order.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the subordinate clause.
Definite article, masculine, accusative singular; determiner of 'Film'.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object of 'sieht'.
Finite transitive verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; predicate of the subordinate clause (verb-final position).
